title: [SV] Verification failures for inout operations with type alias
body:
```mlir
  hw.type_scope @_Foo  {
    hw.typedecl @_Foo_type0 : !hw.struct<io: i1>
  }
  hw.module @Foo() -> () {
    %.b.output = sv.wire  : !hw.inout<typealias<@_Foo_type0, !hw.struct<io: i1>>>
    %0 = sv.struct_field_inout %.b.output["io"] : !hw.inout<typealias<@_Foo_type0, !hw.struct<io: i1>>>
    hw.output
  }
```

Currently this raises a verification failure. 
```
bar.mlir:7:10: error: 'sv.struct_field_inout' op operand #0 must be an inout type with struct field, but got '!hw.inout<typealias<@_Foo_type0, !hw.struct<io: i1>>>'
    %0 = sv.struct_field_inout %.b.output["io"] : !hw.inout<typealias<@_Foo_type0, !hw.struct<io: i1>>>
```
This is caused by the ods definition of `InOutStructType`. It is necessary to look at an inner types or a canonical type of type alias. 

This problem is also applicable to other inout operations like array_index_inout, part_select_inout.
